summary: OpenNori approve now returns next_recommendation and agent_next immediately after user AC approval. In the real settings-page smoke, approved concrete Product AC routed to architecture_needs_review with nori-architecture-brainstorm before implementation/evidence work, so the agent does not need an extra resume step or guess the next phase.

sources.label: npx vitest run test/cli-commands.test.js -t 'approve command module'
sources.command: npx vitest run test/cli-commands.test.js -t 'approve command module'

sources.label: approve smoke: discover -> draft --from-discovery -> approve returns architecture_needs_review
sources.command: approve smoke: discover -> draft --from-discovery -> approve returns architecture_needs_review

reviewability: Run the targeted approve tests and the smoke flow; inspect approve JSON for data.agent_next.state=architecture_needs_review.
limitations: This verifies immediate post-approval routing; actual baseline quality is handled by nori-architecture-brainstorm and user confirmation.
